prompt: Transform the stealthy operative into a futuristic cyber-ninja, blending sleek armor with neon accents and high-tech gadgets for an epic quest.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the central operative character into a futuristic cyber-ninja. Update their attire to sleek, form-fitting black armor with prominent glowing neon blue and purple accents, particularly on the limbs and torso. Integrate high-tech gadgets such as a more advanced facial mask with integrated optics, glowing wrist-mounted displays, and subtle glowing data lines running across the armor.
objects: Prominent glowing neon blue accents on armor
Prominent glowing neon purple accents on armor
Advanced facial mask with integrated optics
Subtle glowing data lines running across armor
